coverageScore.label: broad_public_coverage

components.label: Central AI policy or guidance source exists
Approved tools, procurement, or licensed tools

limitations: Policy Coverage Score measures breadth of public, source-backed coverage; it is not a policy quality score.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

dimensions.label: Policy presence
dimensions.summary: The public record contains a central AI policy or official institutional guidance source.
dimensions.explanation: This dimension confirms public source-backed policy presence only; it does not judge policy quality or legal adequacy.

basis.evidenceSnippet: The university provides guidance on responsible use of generative AI tools.

dimensions.label: AI disclosure
dimensions.summary: The public record contains source-backed disclosure guidance for material AI use.
dimensions.explanation: The status is based on a cited public claim and should be displayed with review state and source evidence.

basis.evidenceSnippet: Students should acknowledge the use of generative AI where it contributes to submitted work.

dimensions.label: Coursework
dimensions.summary: The public record indicates course or assignment-level conditions for AI use.
dimensions.explanation: This is not advice to students; it summarizes the cited public record and should be checked against current course rules.

basis.evidenceSnippet: Permitted use of AI tools may vary by assessment task and course instruction.

dimensions.label: Exams
dimensions.summary: No source-backed public claim about exam AI use is present in this analysis profile.
dimensions.explanation: Not mentioned means this tracker has no supporting public claim for the dimension; it does not mean AI is allowed or prohibited in exams.
dimensions.notMentionedReason: No reviewed public claim in the current profile mentions exams, tests, quizzes, or proctored assessments.

dimensions.label: Privacy and data entry
dimensions.summary: The public record contains source-backed restrictions on entering sensitive or confidential data into AI tools.
dimensions.explanation: This dimension is based on cited public privacy guidance and should be shown with the original source URL.

basis.evidenceSnippet: Do not enter confidential, personal, or sensitive university data into external AI systems without approval.

dimensions.label: Academic integrity
dimensions.summary: The public record places AI use within academic integrity or assessment-integrity guidance.
dimensions.explanation: This dimension reports the public framing only and does not provide academic integrity advice.

basis.evidenceSnippet: Use of generative AI must comply with academic integrity and assessment requirements.

dimensions.label: Approved tools
dimensions.summary: No source-backed public claim in this profile identifies an institutionally approved or licensed AI tool list.
dimensions.explanation: Not mentioned is not a statement that no approved tool exists; it means the current public evidence profile does not support one.
dimensions.notMentionedReason: The current evidence set does not include a reviewed claim naming approved or institutionally licensed AI tools.

dimensions.label: Named AI services
dimensions.summary: The public record mentions generative AI tools generally but does not support a reliable service-specific treatment classification.
dimensions.explanation: This status prevents generic mentions from being treated as a specific ChatGPT, Copilot, or DeepSeek policy.

basis.evidenceSnippet: The university provides guidance on responsible use of generative AI tools.

dimensions.label: Teaching guidance
dimensions.summary: The public record contains teaching guidance for instructors using or regulating generative AI.
dimensions.explanation: The dimension is based on an instructor-facing public source and should link back to the original source.

basis.evidenceSnippet: Instructors are encouraged to communicate permitted AI use in course and assessment instructions.

dimensions.label: Research guidance
dimensions.summary: The current evidence mentions responsible AI generally but does not support a separate research-use classification.
dimensions.explanation: The unclear status is evidence-backed but weaker than a specific research guidance classification.

basis.evidenceSnippet: The university provides guidance on responsible use of generative AI tools.

dimensions.label: Security and procurement
dimensions.summary: No source-backed public claim in this profile separately mentions AI security review, procurement, SSO, or vendor approval.
dimensions.explanation: Not mentioned means no supporting public claim exists in this profile; it is not evidence that no internal process exists.
dimensions.notMentionedReason: The current profile has no reviewed public claim about security review, procurement, authentication, or vendor approval.

limitations: This analysis summarizes public source-backed tracker metadata only.
No source-backed public claim found is not evidence that no policy exists.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
suggestedCitation: University AI Policy Tracker. "Australian National University (ANU) AI Policy Analysis Profile." Version v1. Last generated 2026-05-11. https://eduaipolicy.org/universities/anu
